Contact

Zuzi Knaze is an interior creator based in The Hague, working at the intersection of architecture, spatial design, and everyday life.

Every project starts with careful listening — to the space, to the people who inhabit it, and to the light that moves through it. The result is always honest and personal: spaces that feel both considered and lived-in, where beauty grows from function rather than sitting on top of it.

Zuzi works on residential and small commercial projects, from full renovations to custom furniture and focused consultations. Sustainability and natural materials guide each decision — not as a trend, but as a way of thinking.

Every commission is an opportunity to create something creative, meaningful, and lasting.

Zuzi Knaze

zuzana.knazeova@gmail.com The Hague, Netherlands Available for projects in the Netherlands and beyond.
